notes: Excellent professional email with appropriate tone, complete information, and proper structure. Clear decline with reason and multiple alternatives offered. Minor deductions: (1) Created two files (email_draft.txt and email_draft_1.txt) when only one was requested—slightly inefficient; (2) Email is marginally longer than optimal (approximately 160 words vs. 50-150 range) though still well within professional standards. Overall near-perfect execution of the task.
